markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of Linear project management tool for GrowthX team members.](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Linear serves as an efficient task management and reminder system, integrating with Slack for notifications](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Primary use: recurring client-related tasks (e.g., updates, reports) and one-off project tasks](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Customizable views and filters help manage tasks across multiple projects](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Some potential integration issues noted (e.g., Smith.ai channel, Airtable integration request)](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Linear Basics and Navigation

  - [Landing page shows all projects (clients, delivery team, build team)](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Kanban-style board with customizable columns (backlog, to-do, in progress, done, canceled)](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - ["My Issues" view aggregates tasks across all projects](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Inbox shows cards/projects where user is tagged](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Filtering options available to focus on specific clients or task types](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Task Creation and Management

  - [Easy task creation using "+" button](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Option to set tasks as recurring](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Assign tasks to team members](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Add context, comments, and tag others within tasks](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Tasks automatically move between columns based on status updates](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

### Slack Integration

  - [Linear tasks appear as notifications in relevant Slack channels](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Team members can update task status directly from Slack](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Some channels (e.g., Smith.ai) may have integration issues](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Use Cases and Best Practices

  - [Vivek uses Linear for client comps, updates, and recurring tasks (e.g., Monday updates, Looker reports, meeting agendas)](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Recommends checking "My Issues" daily to stay on top of tasks](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Encourages team to use Linear in ways that best suit their workflow](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Suggests maintaining some activity in Linear to demonstrate usage to management](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

### Communication Cadence

  - [Monday: Weekly update sent (previous week recap, current week plan, outstanding issues)](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Pre-meeting: Agenda sent with relevant charts](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Post-meeting: Call notes distributed the following day](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team members to explore Linear and determine how best to incorporate it into their workflows](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Elvis and Marisol to follow up with Daniel regarding Smith.ai channel integration issues](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Marisol to inquire about potential Airtable integration with Linear](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Team to ensure regular updates are posted in client channels (internal and external) as per established cadence](https://fathom.video/share/VYrYDw7oK8NYoPzrSAA9ssTU-yPat74R?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
